headline: Q4 Earnings Highlights: MetLife (NYSE:MET) Vs The Rest Of The Life Insurance Stocks
summary: Looking back on life insurance stocks’ Q4 earnings, we examine this quarter’s best and worst performers, including MetLife (NYSE:MET) and its peers.
